targetMarkets.name: Knoxville, TN
targetMarkets.thesis: Tennessee public-source pivot: identify infill builder demand first, then ingest verified county/city parcel and permit records before any seller calls are promoted.

targetMarkets.name: Chattanooga, TN
targetMarkets.thesis: Use permit and parcel-source discovery to validate scattered-lot builder activity before seller outreach.

targetMarkets.name: Nashville edge, TN
targetMarkets.thesis: Watch high-growth perimeter submarkets and only promote parcel leads after public ownership/buildability data is verified.

buyerSources.description: Discovery target for Knox County / Knoxville GIS and permit evidence. Contains no buyer records until verified permits or builder contacts are ingested.
Discovery target for Hamilton County / Chattanooga GIS and building-permit evidence. Contains no buyer records until verified public records are ingested.
Discovery target for Metro Nashville / Davidson County permits, parcel GIS, and builder activity. Contains no buyer records until verified public records are ingested.

parcelSources.description: Knox County public GIS / property records watchlist. No parcel is callable until owner, situs, mailing, land-use, and buildability fields are verified.
Hamilton County public GIS / property records watchlist. No parcel is callable until verified public-owner records are ingested.
Metro Nashville parcel/GIS watchlist. No parcel is callable until verified owner and buildability records are ingested.
